en: Its importance was not fully apparent to me until I observed your penchant for feeding pigeons.
ko: 당신이 비둘기를 먹이는 걸 보았을 때, 그 중요성이 완전히 드러났습니다.

en: Then it occurred that with an empire so enormous, even you must keep a record of it somewhere.
ko: 그렇게 거대한 제국을 가진 이상, 당신도 어딘가에 기록을 남겨야 할 것입니다.

en: I then only required the notebook itself.
You didn't make it easy. What have I done, monsieur?
ko: 쉽게 해주지 않았군요. 제가 뭘 했죠, 몽시외?

en: I would need to endure a considerable amount of pain.
But the notebook would undoubtedly be encoded, so how then to break the code? Rook takes Rook.
ko: 하지만 노트북은 분명 암호화되어 있을 것이니, 그럼 어떻게 암호를 풀까요? 룩이 룩을 잡습니다.

en: Pawn takes Rook. Bishop to Bishop seven.
Does the art of domestic horticulture mean anything to you?
ko: 가정 원예의 기술이 당신에게 의미가 있나요?
